label: 合并子树
description: 把多个 scene 在各自 focus 下展开的子树合并成一棵 master scene。算法：取第一个 scene 作为基底，把每个 scene 在 focus 下的子节点逐个保序 graft 到 master（各自分配递增 version，保持 z-order）；多个 scene 合并到同一 focus 时串接其子节点，同名子节点保留先到者；输出 focus 固定为根节点 /。「递归展开协议」每层 fanout 的收束步骤。
description-en: Merge multiple scenes (each with a subtree expanded under its own focus) into one master scene. Algorithm: take the first scene as base, then graft each scene's focus children one by one in order (each assigned an increasing version to preserve z-order); when multiple scenes merge under the same focus their children are concatenated, and duplicate-named children keep the first arrival; output focus is fixed to the root "/". The convergence step of each fanout level in the recursive expansion protocol.
icon: 多个不同的子树枝条汇聚成一棵主树，主树根部有十字光标，扁平插画风格，主色2种。

inputs.name: scenes
inputs.label: scene 列表
inputs.description: 一组 scene；每个的 focus 子树是该 branch 独立展开的结果
inputs.description-en: List of scenes; each has its focus subtree independently expanded by its branch.

outputs.name: scene
outputs.label: 合并后 scene
outputs.description: 包含所有 branch 子树展开结果的 master scene；focus = 根节点 /
outputs.description-en: Master scene containing every branch's expanded subtree; focus = root "/".

outputs.name: mergedCount
outputs.label: 合并数量
outputs.description: 实际参与合并的 scene 数量（focus='/' 或 focus 节点不存在的 scene 不计）
outputs.description-en: Number of scenes that actually contributed to the merge (scenes with focus='/' or a missing focus node are not counted).
